name: Playwright (Browserless)
short_desc: Headless Chrome browser accessible via REST, WebSocket and Playwright API.
author: browserless
description: Browserless Chrome is a headless browser-as-a-service. It exposes a REST and WebSocket API compatible with Puppeteer, Playwright and Selenium. Useful for web scraping, screenshot generation, PDF rendering, automated testing, and any headless browser automation task.

form_fields.label: API Token
form_fields.hint: Token used to authenticate requests to the browserless API.

form_fields.label: Max concurrent sessions
form_fields.hint: Maximum number of simultaneous browser sessions.

form_fields.label: Session timeout (ms)
form_fields.hint: Timeout for each browser session in milliseconds.
